query: SELECT id, brandId, status, stage, ideasGenerated, ideasApproved, packagesGenerated, packagesInspected, packagesPassedInspection, readyForReview, startedAt, completedAt FROM pipeline_runs ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
